title: Intense Indian Tamarind Curry
description: A malty, chewy vegan Bengali curry with tamarind balls and miso-marinated tofu, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Marinate the tofu by whisking coconut milk, miso paste, tamarind paste, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and salt until smooth; add tofu cubes and let rest for ten minutes.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat; sauté the diced onion until translucent, about three minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for thirty seconds until aromatic.
Stir in the mixed vegetables and cook for four minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the miso-tamarind coconut milk mixture and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the marinated tofu cubes, reduce heat to low, and cover; simmer for eight minutes until the tofu is heated through and flavors meld.
Remove from heat, taste, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro if desired, accompanied by steamed rice.
